description: Canonical cleanup allowlist for clean.bat (via tools/app/cli.mjs clean). clean deletes ONLY paths in cleanable_categories, and never a path overlapping a 'preserve' entry.
notes: user-data (sessions/history) and credentials are NEVER cleaned by clean.bat; demo-reset.bat handles opt-in demo state reset.
Package-manager caches outside the project (npm/pnpm global store) are external and out of scope.
